negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for picuris_negative
% SZS output start Proof for picuris_negative
1. in_region(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) | in_region(picuris_mountains,texas) [input(axiom)]
2. located_in(harding_pegmatite_mine,picuris_mountains) [input(axiom)]
3. donated(harding_pegmatite_mine) [input(axiom)]
4. ! [X0] : (in_region(X0,texas) => ~? [X1] : (located_in(X1,X0) & donated(X1))) [input(axiom)]
5. in_region(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) [input(conjecture)]
6. ~in_region(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) [negated conjecture 5]
7. ~in_region(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) [flattening 6]
8. ! [X0] : (! [X1] : (~located_in(X1,X0) | ~donated(X1)) | ~in_region(X0,texas)) [ennf transformation 4]
9. in_region(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) | in_region(picuris_mountains,texas) [cnf transformation 1]
10. located_in(harding_pegmatite_mine,picuris_mountains) [cnf transformation 2]
11. donated(harding_pegmatite_mine) [cnf transformation 3]
12. ~located_in(X1,X0) | ~donated(X1) | ~in_region(X0,texas) [cnf transformation 8]
13. ~in_region(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) [cnf transformation 7]
14. in_region(picuris_mountains,texas) [forward subsumption resolution 9,13]
15. ~donated(harding_pegmatite_mine) | ~in_region(picuris_mountains,texas) [resolution 12,10]
16. ~in_region(picuris_mountains,texas) [forward subsumption resolution 15,11]
17. $false [forward subsumption resolution 16,14]
% SZS output end Proof for picuris_negative
% Termination reason: Refutation
